zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany於1491年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾巴甘尼時，他的父親Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany30歲，母親Katherine Kennedy26歲。他於1505年與Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum在蘇格蘭艾斯爾艾爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1551年1月10日在英國蘇格蘭斯林史爾享年60歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany于1491年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾巴甘尼时，他的父亲Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany30岁，母亲Katherine Kennedy26岁。他于1505年与Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum在苏格兰艾斯爾艾爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1551年1月10日在英国苏格兰斯林史爾享年60岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Kennedy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Ceannéidigh ‘descendant of Ceannéidigh’ (from ceann ‘head’ + éidigh ‘ugly’); or from the Scottish Gaelic Mac Cinnèidigh, consisting of mac ‘son’ with an equivalent name. Compare Canaday , Cannady , Cannedy , Kannady , and Kenedy .

History: Kennedy ancestral lands are found both in Ireland and in Scotland, where the family's medieval ancestral seat is sited on the Ayrshire coast, facing the Irish Sea. — The great-grandparents of President John Fitzgerald Kennedy (1917–63) came to North America as immigrants from Ireland in the 1840s. His paternal great-grandparents were Patrick Kennedy (1823–58), born in Dunganstown, County Wexford, Ireland, and Bridget Murphy, who was born probably in Owenduff, County Wexford, Ireland c. 1827; they came to Boston, MA, in 1849. His maternal great-grandparents were Thomas Fitzgerald (1823–85), who was born in Bruff, County Limerick, Ireland, and Rose Anna Cox, who was born probably in Tomregan or Kinawley, County Cavan, Ireland, c. 1835; they came to Boston, MA, in 1857. — An early Scottish Kennedy forebear of a quite different family was British colonial official Archibald Kennedy (1685–1763), the son of Alexander Kennedy of Craigoch, who emigrated to NY c. 1710.

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

variants.name: Allaster
meanings: variant spelling of   Alistair .  It is borne, for example, by a minstrel in  Sir Walter Scott's  Rob Roy (  1818 ), which ensured its 19th-century popularity.

variants.name: Alistair
meanings: Altered spelling of Alasdair, the Scottish Gaelic form of Alexander . Alexander has long been a popular name in Scotland, having been borne by three medieval kings of the country. Alistair is now widely used in the English-speaking world, often by those without Scottish connections.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany was born in 1491, in Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany, was 30 and his mother, Katherine Kennedy, was 26. He married Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum in 1505, in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. He died on 10 January 1551, in Stirlingshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 60, and was buried in Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany est né en 1491, à Bargany, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Katherine Kennedy, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum en 1505, à Ayr, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 10 janvier 1551, à Stirlingshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany 1491 in Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany 30 und seine Mutter Katherine Kennedy 26. Er hat 1505 in Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 10. Januar 1551 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Stirlingshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Schottland, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany è nato il nel 1491 nel Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Katherine Kennedy, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum nel 1505, nel Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 10 gennaio 1551, nel Stirlingshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Scozia, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Barganyが1491年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアバーガニーで生まれた時，父Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Barganyは30歳，母Katherine Kennedyは26歳であった。1505年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアエイルでMariot Dunbar of Mochrumと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1551年1月10日にイギリススコットランドスティルリングシュアイアで60歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany(이)가 1491년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 바건이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Katherine Kennedy(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1505년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 에이르에서 Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1551년 1월 10일 영국 스코틀랜드 스티를링실르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany nasceu em 1491, em Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Kennedy, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum em 1505, em Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 10 de janeiro de 1551, em Stirlingshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany родился в 1491 г. в местности баргани, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Kennedy, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum в 1505 г. в местности аир, аиршир, Шотландия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Он умер 10 января 1551 г. в местности стирлингшир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander - Alasdair Kennedy 4th of Bargany nació en 1491, en Bargany, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Thomas Kennedy 3rd of Bargany, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Katherine Kennedy, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Mariot Dunbar of Mochrum en 1505, en Ayr, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 4 hijas. Murió el 10 de enero de 1551, en Stirlingshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Escocia, Reino Unido.
